title: dol fiduciary rule / regulation best interest / prohibited transaction exemptions | Regulatory Guidance | SIFMA, FSI Statement on Order Vacating the DOL 2024 Fiduciar...
summary: A U.S. District Court for the Northern District of Texas vacated the Department of Labor's 2024 Definition of Investment Advice Fiduciary rule and related prohibited transaction exemptions. SIFMA and FSI, as Plaintiffs-Intervenors in the case, praised the ruling as consistent with the Fifth Circuit's 2018 striking down of a similar 2016 DOL rule.
